segments: : مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْمُمْتَحِنَهِ فِی فَرَائِضِهِ وَ نَوَافِلِهِ امْتَحَنَ اللَّهُ قَلْبَهُ لِلْإِیمَانِ وَ نَوَّرَ لَهُ بَصَرَهُ وَ لَا یُصِیبُهُ فَقْرٌ أَبَداً وَ لَا جُنُونٌ فِی بَدَنِهِ وَ لَا فِی وُلْدِهِ.
arabic.text: : مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الْمُمْتَحِنَهِ فِی فَرَائِضِهِ وَ نَوَافِلِهِ امْتَحَنَ اللَّهُ قَلْبَهُ لِلْإِیمَانِ وَ نَوَّرَ لَهُ بَصَرَهُ وَ لَا یُصِیبُهُ فَقْرٌ أَبَداً وَ لَا جُنُونٌ فِی بَدَنِهِ وَ لَا فِی وُلْدِهِ.

segments: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from ’Asim al-Khayyat from Abi Hamzah al-Thumali from Ali b. al-Hussain (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Mumtahena in his obligatory and recommended prayer, Allah examines his heart for belief, and brightens his sight and he is never ever afflicted with poverty, insanity in himself or his children.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from ’Asim al-Khayyat from Abi Hamzah al-Thumali from Ali b. al-Hussain (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Mumtahena in his obligatory and recommended prayer, Allah examines his heart for belief, and brightens his sight and he is never ever afflicted with poverty, insanity in himself or his children.”

narratorChain.raw: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ الْخَیَّاطِ عَنْ أَبِی حَمْزَهَ الثُّمَالِیِّ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ ع قَالَ
